titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 67
Prayers and Missal

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: ዘሠርክ።
msItem.incipit: አምላክነ፡ ዘዲበ፡ ኪሩቤል፡ ትነብር፡ እምኀበ፡ መላእክት፡ ትትአኰት፡ ወትሴባሕ፡

msItem.title: ዘይነግሥ።
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናዓኵቶ፡ ወንሴብሖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዘኪያሁ፡ ይሴብሑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ኀይለ፡ ሰማያት፡

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse

notatedMusic.desc:
Some of these liturgies are accompanied by notes indicating the recitation mode. The following is the alphabetical list of all occurring letter combinations. See also Description de l'Égypte ou Recueil des observations et des recherches qui ont été faites en Égypte pendant l'expédition de l'armée française. Tome quatorzième. État moderneC. L. F.PanckouckeParisImprimerie de C. L. F. Panckoucke1826XIVhttp://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k28011z/f4.itembm:Panckoucke1826Descriptionbm:Panckoucke1826Description260–299.

msItem.title:
በስመ፡
ሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ከመ፡ ይበሉ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ወዲያቆን፡ ወኵሉ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ዘመፍትው፡ በበ፡ ጊዜሁ፡ በከመ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ አበዊነ፡ ግብጻውያን።
msItem.note: The text of this manuscript differs considerably from Modus baptizandi, preces et benedictiones quibus Ecclesia Ethiopum utitur, cum sacerdotes benedicunt puerperae unà cum infante Ecclesiam ingredienti, post quadragesimum puerperij diem. Item orationes quibus ijdem utuntur in sacramento baptismi et confirmationis. Item missa qua communiter utuntur, quae etiam canon uniuersalis appellatur nunc primum ex lingua Chaldea siue Aethiopica in Latinam conuersaePetrus AethiopsRomaeapud Antonium Bladum1549https://babel.hathitrust.org/cgi/pt?id=ucm.5316540407;view=1up;seq=3Early studiesbm:Petrus1549ModusEarly studiesbm:Petrus1549Modus.
The prayers described in to do not constitute the entirety of the work.

msItem.title: First Prayer
msItem.note: This prayer is the same as the one opening the Coptic liturgy of St Gregory, see Liturgiarum orientalium collectio, in qua continentur liturgiæ Coptitarum tres, Basilii, Gregorii theologi, & Cyrilli Alexandrini, Latinè conversæ secundùm exemplar Copticum. Adjunctæ sunt rubricæ rituales ex variis codicibus mss. collectæ, & suis locis appositæ. Earumdem liturgiarum contextus Græcus, ex codice Græco-Arabico Bibliothecæ Regiæ: priorum duarum nunquam editus: tertiæ pridem editus sub titulo Liturgiæ sancti Marci, cum versione Latina & notis necessariis. Commentarius in Liturgiam Copticam sancti Basilii, in quo ritus, & omnia ad disciplinam Eucharisticam pertinentia explicantur, præcipuè ex autoribus Orientalibus. Notæ breviores in reliquas Liturgias. Liturgiæ generalis Æthiopum nova versio, cum notis necessariis. Accedunt dissertationes quatuorEusèbeRenaudotParisiisApud Joannem Baptistam Coignard1716Ihttps://archive.org/stream/liturgiarumorie05renagoog#page/n6/mode/2upbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarumbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarum26; 95

msItem.title: Second Prayer
msItem.note: This prayer agrees with the second prayer of the printed Ethiopic text, Testamentum Novum: Cum Epistola Pauli Ad Hebreos tantum, cum concordantijs Evangelistarum Eusebii & numeratione omnium verborum eorundem. Missale cum benedictione incensi cerae et c. Alphabetum in lingua ግእዝ፡ gheez, idest libera quia a nulla alia originem duxit, & vulgo dicitur Chaldea, Quae omnia Fr. Petrus Ethyops auxilio piorum sedente Paulo. III. Pont. MAx. & Claudio illius regni Imperatore imprimi curavitPetrus EthyopsRomaeImpensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus1548https://books.google.de/books?id=KPNa9Mc5gjYCEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548TestEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548Test.

msItem.title: Third Prayer: ላዕለ፡ ንዋየ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
msItem.note: This prayer agrees with the one translated from an Arabic manuscript in Liturgiarum orientalium collectio, in qua continentur liturgiæ Coptitarum tres, Basilii, Gregorii theologi, & Cyrilli Alexandrini, Latinè conversæ secundùm exemplar Copticum. Adjunctæ sunt rubricæ rituales ex variis codicibus mss. collectæ, & suis locis appositæ. Earumdem liturgiarum contextus Græcus, ex codice Græco-Arabico Bibliothecæ Regiæ: priorum duarum nunquam editus: tertiæ pridem editus sub titulo Liturgiæ sancti Marci, cum versione Latina & notis necessariis. Commentarius in Liturgiam Copticam sancti Basilii, in quo ritus, & omnia ad disciplinam Eucharisticam pertinentia explicantur, præcipuè ex autoribus Orientalibus. Notæ breviores in reliquas Liturgias. Liturgiæ generalis Æthiopum nova versio, cum notis necessariis. Accedunt dissertationes quatuorEusèbeRenaudotParisiisApud Joannem Baptistam Coignard1716Ihttps://archive.org/stream/liturgiarumorie05renagoog#page/n6/mode/2upbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarumbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarum53.

msItem.title: Fourth Prayer
msItem.note: This prayer is translated in Liturgiarum orientalium collectio, in qua continentur liturgiæ Coptitarum tres, Basilii, Gregorii theologi, & Cyrilli Alexandrini, Latinè conversæ secundùm exemplar Copticum. Adjunctæ sunt rubricæ rituales ex variis codicibus mss. collectæ, & suis locis appositæ. Earumdem liturgiarum contextus Græcus, ex codice Græco-Arabico Bibliothecæ Regiæ: priorum duarum nunquam editus: tertiæ pridem editus sub titulo Liturgiæ sancti Marci, cum versione Latina & notis necessariis. Commentarius in Liturgiam Copticam sancti Basilii, in quo ritus, & omnia ad disciplinam Eucharisticam pertinentia explicantur, præcipuè ex autoribus Orientalibus. Notæ breviores in reliquas Liturgias. Liturgiæ generalis Æthiopum nova versio, cum notis necessariis. Accedunt dissertationes quatuorEusèbeRenaudotParisiisApud Joannem Baptistam Coignard1716Ihttps://archive.org/stream/liturgiarumorie05renagoog#page/n6/mode/2upbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarumbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarum55, Oratio pro Mappâ nigrâ qua est super altare.

msItem.title: Fifth Prayer: ኀበ፡ ታቦት፡
msItem.note: This prayer is printed in Testamentum Novum: Cum Epistola Pauli Ad Hebreos tantum, cum concordantijs Evangelistarum Eusebii & numeratione omnium verborum eorundem. Missale cum benedictione incensi cerae et c. Alphabetum in lingua ግእዝ፡ gheez, idest libera quia a nulla alia originem duxit, & vulgo dicitur Chaldea, Quae omnia Fr. Petrus Ethyops auxilio piorum sedente Paulo. III. Pont. MAx. & Claudio illius regni Imperatore imprimi curavitPetrus EthyopsRomaeImpensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus1548https://books.google.de/books?id=KPNa9Mc5gjYCEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548TestEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548Test158va11–33

The prayer for Church officials mentions the patriarch of Alexandria,
John, and the metropolitan of Ethiopia,
Yoḥannǝs.

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘአበዊነ፡ ሐዋርያት።
msItem.note: In the prayer for the church dignitaries the Patriarch Ignatius and the metropolitan Yoḥannǝs are mentioned.

msItem.title: እምጽሐፈ፡ ኪዳን፡ ዘነገሮሙ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ለሐዋርያቲሁ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ትንሣኤሁ፡ እሙታን፡
አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ባስልዮስ፡
msItem.incipit: ሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ ከመ፡ ይበሉ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ወዲያቆን፡ ወሕዝብ። እግዚኦ፡ መሐረነ፡ ፫፡ ጊዜ፡ በል። ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ስምዓነ፡ ወመሐረነ።
msItem.note: The text generally agrees with the Coptic text of the same liturgy. Liturgiarum orientalium collectio, in qua continentur liturgiæ Coptitarum tres, Basilii, Gregorii theologi, & Cyrilli Alexandrini, Latinè conversæ secundùm exemplar Copticum. Adjunctæ sunt rubricæ rituales ex variis codicibus mss. collectæ, & suis locis appositæ. Earumdem liturgiarum contextus Græcus, ex codice Græco-Arabico Bibliothecæ Regiæ: priorum duarum nunquam editus: tertiæ pridem editus sub titulo Liturgiæ sancti Marci, cum versione Latina & notis necessariis. Commentarius in Liturgiam Copticam sancti Basilii, in quo ritus, & omnia ad disciplinam Eucharisticam pertinentia explicantur, præcipuè ex autoribus Orientalibus. Notæ breviores in reliquas Liturgias. Liturgiæ generalis Æthiopum nova versio, cum notis necessariis. Accedunt dissertationes quatuorEusèbeRenaudotParisiisApud Joannem Baptistam Coignard1716Ihttps://archive.org/stream/liturgiarumorie05renagoog#page/n6/mode/2upbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarumbm:Renaudot1716Liturgiarum13–25

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ አትናቴዎስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት።
msItem.incipit: ይ፡ ዲ፡ ዮም፡ በዛቲ፡ እለት፡ ተጋባእክሙ፡ አጽምዑ፡ ቅዳሴሃ፡ ለሰንበተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ቅድስት። ይ፡ ካ፡ አሰምዕ፡ ለክሙ፡ ሰማያተ፡ አሰምዕ፡ ለክሙ፡ ምድረ፡ ከመ፡ ትቁሙ፡ በፍርሃት፡

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ኤጲፋንዮስ።
msItem.incipit: ዓቢይ፡ ውእቱ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በዕዩ፡ በዕበዩ ቅዱስ፡ በቅዳሴሁ፡ እኩት፡ በአኰቴቱ፡ ወስቡሕ፡ በስብሐቲሁ፡ ቀዳማዊ፡ ዘኢይብልዎ፡ እምይእዜ፡ ወማዕከላዊ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዘኢይብልዎ፡ እምይእዜ፡

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡
msItem.incipit: ግሩም፡ በውስተ፡ ደመናት፡ ወልዑል፡ እምሰማያት፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ስቡሕ፡ በኵሉ፡ ፍናዊሁ። አምላከ፡ አማልክት፡ ጸባዓት፡ ፍጹም።

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቁርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡
አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘሥሩግ።
msItem.incipit: በል፡ ተንሥኡ፡ በፍርሃተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ከመ፡ ታጽምዑ፡ አርኅዉ፡ መሳክወ፡ አዕዛኒክሙ፡ ወአንቅሑ፡ ልበክሙ፡ አኮ፡ በከ፡ ዘይከውን፡ ሀለዎተነ፡ ውስተ፡ ዝንቱ።

msItem.title: አኵቴተ፡ ቍባርን፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ዘደረሰ፡ አባ፡ ኅርያቆስ፡ ዘብኅንሳ።
msItem.note: The prayer for the dignitaries of the Church mention the names of Matthew, patriarch of Alexandria, and Yoḥannǝs, metropolitan of Ethiopia.

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘዮሐንስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡
msItem.incipit: ኀቤከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ አንቃዕዶነ፡ አዕይንተነ፡ አንሣእነ፡ ልበነ፡ ወአልአልነ፡ ሕሊናነ።

msItem.title: አኰቴተ፡ ቍርባን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ጎርጎርዎስ፡
msItem.incipit: ነአኵቶ፡ ለገባሬ፡ ሠናያት፡ ላዕሌነ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ መሓሪ፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡

msItem.title: ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን።
msItem.incipit: እግዚአብሔር፡ ወልድ፡ ዋሕድ፡ ዘተፈነወ፡ ወኀደረ፡ ውስተ፡ ማኅፀና፡ ለማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ቅድስት፡ ሰላም፡ እምኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡

item.desc: The name of the original owner, Takla Giyorgis, has been erased and replaced by the names of Daqiqa Ḍagāy and Takla Giyorgis.
The invocations at the end of the manuscript mention the names of Takla Giyorgis's wife Walatta Dǝngǝl and of Takla Giyorgis's wife Walatta Mikāʾel and his sons Zamāryām and ʿƎbna Giyorgis.

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
